title: Kuber Mantra
intro: Kuber Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Kuber.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Yakshaya Kuberaya Vaishravanaya Dhanadhanyadhipataye Dhanadhanyasamriddhim Me Dehi Dapaya Swaha.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to Lord Kubera,
the King of the Yakshas,
and the Lord of wealth
and abundance.
O Lord,
please bless me with
prosperity and abundance.

faq.q1: When should Kuber Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Kuber Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning, evening, or on Fridays and festivals such as Dhanteras.
faq.q2: How many times should Kuber Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Kuber Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Kuber Mantra is believed to bring prosperity, financial well-being, abundance, and the blessings of Lord Kuber.
faq.a4: Yes, anyone may chant Kuber Mantra with faith and devotion.
faq.q5: Can Kuber Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a5: Yes, Kuber Mantra can be chanted daily with devotion.
